answers: Marine engineering deals with the design, construction, operation, and maintenance of ships, boats, submarines, and other watercraft. It also covers offshore structures like oil rigs.
Marine engineering holo ship, submarine, ar offshore platform design ar maintain korar engineering branch. Sea-te kaj korte hole ei engineering lage.
Marine engineers work on propulsion systems, navigation equipment, and the structural integrity of vessels. They ensure ships run safely and efficiently.

Marine engineering covers everything nautical — from cargo ship engines to submarine systems to offshore oil platforms. It combines mechanical, electrical, and structural engineering for maritime applications.

feelings.question: marine engineering ki?
feelings.answer: Marine engineering deals with the design, construction, operation, and maintenance of ships, boats, submarines, and other watercraft. It also covers offshore structures like oil rigs. Marine engineering is an important field in today's connected world that involves designing machines, engines, HVA, manufacturing systems, power generation, and the structural integrity of vessels.
